title: Chapter One
text:
## Chapter One

“The foremost of my monk disciples in long standing is Koṇḍañña Who Understood. … with great wisdom is Sāriputta. … with psychic power is Mahāmoggallāna. … who advocate austerities is Mahākassapa. … with clairvoyance is Anuruddha. … from eminent families is Bhaddiya son of Kāḷīgodhā. … with a charming voice is Bhaddiya the Dwarf. … with a lion’s roar is Bhāradvāja the Alms-Gatherer. … who speak on the teaching is Puṇṇa son of Mantāṇī. … who explain in detail the meaning of a brief statement is Mahākaccāna.”
